allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Prepare v2.2.1: Fix OptionsFlow for HA 2025.12+ compatibility

- Switch OptionsFlow to OptionsFlowWithConfigEntry \(available since HA 2024.3\)
- Remove deprecated CONN_CLASS_LOCAL_POLL import
- Add unit tests for config flow and options flow \(352 lines\)
- Update manifest.json version to 2.2.1 and fork references
- Update release infrastructure for jnctech fork
- Add bugfix documentation and release plan

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix 500 error on Configure for HA 2025.12+

Switch OptionsFlow to OptionsFlowWithConfigEntry to resolve the
500 Internal Server Error when clicking Configure on the integration.

HA 2025.12 made OptionsFlow.config_entry a read-only framework property.
The integration was manually setting self._config_entry in __init__,
which conflicts with the new framework behavior.

Changes:
- Replace OptionsFlow with OptionsFlowWithConfigEntry \(available since
  HA 2024.3, which is our minimum supported version per hacs.json\)
- Remove custom __init__ that manually stored config_entry and options
  \(both are now managed by the OptionsFlowWithConfigEntry base class\)
- Replace all self._config_entry references with self.config_entry
- Remove deprecated CONN_CLASS_LOCAL_POLL import and CONNECTION_CLASS
  attribute \(superseded by iot_class in manifest.json\)

Fixes #451
Fixes #458
Fixes #418

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(ssh -p 2222 jc@192.168.30.10 "cd /workspace/hacs/Mikrotik && git fetch && git checkout feature/poe-monitoring && git pull && pytest tests/ -v 2>&1")
Bash(ssh -p 2222 -o PasswordAuthentication=yes jc@192.168.30.10 "cd /workspace/hacs/Mikrotik && git fetch origin && git checkout feature/poe-monitoring && git pull && pytest tests/ -v 2>&1")
